sentences.speaker: EDMUND
sentences.text:
Come hither, captain. Hark.
[gives FIRST CAPTAIN a document]
Take thou this note. Go follow them to prison.
One step I have advanced thee. If thou dost
As this instructs thee, thou dost make thy way
To noble fortunes. Know thou this: that men
Are as the time is. To be tender-minded
Does not become a sword. Thy great employment
Will not bear question. Either say thou'lt do ’t,
Or thrive by other means.

sentences.text:
Come hither, captain. Hark.
[gives FIRST CAPTAIN a document]
Take thou this note. Go follow them to prison.
One step I have advanced thee. If thou dost
As this instructs thee, thou dost make thy way
To noble fortunes. Know thou this: that men
Are as the time is. To be tender-minded
Does not become a sword. Thy great employment
Will not bear question. Either say thou'lt do ’t,
Or thrive by other means.

sentences.speaker: EDMUND
sentences.text:
About it, and write “happy” when thou’st done.
Mark, I say, instantly, and carry it so
As I have set it down.

sentences.speaker: EDMUND

sentences.speaker: FIRST CAPTAIN
sentences.text:
I cannot draw a cart, nor eat dried oats.
If it be man’s work, I’ll do ’t.

Flourish. Enter the Duke of ALBANY, the two ladies GONERIL and REGAN, a SECOND CAPTAIN, and soldiers
Flourish. Enter the Duke of ALBANY, the two ladies GONERIL and REGAN, a SECOND CAPTAIN, and soldiers

sentences.speaker: ALBANY
sentences.text:
[to EDMUND] Sir, you have shown today your valiant
strain,
And fortune led you well. You have the captives
That were the opposites of this day’s strife.
I do require them of you, so to use them
As we shall find their merits and our safety
May equally determine.

sentences.speaker: EDMUND
sentences.text:
Sir, I thought it fit
To send the old and miserable king
To some retention and appointed guard—
Whose age has charms in it, whose title more—
To pluck the common bosom on his side,
An turn our impressed lances in our eyes
Which do command them. With him I sent the queen,
My reason all the same, and they are ready
Tomorrow or at further space t' appear
Where you shall hold your session. At this time
We sweat and bleed. The friend hath lost his friend,
And the best quarrels, in the heat, are cursed
By those that feel their sharpness.
The question of Cordelia and her father
Requires a fitter place.

sentences.speaker: ALBANY
sentences.text:
Sir, by your patience,
I hold you but a subject of this war,
Not as a brother.

sentences.speaker: REGAN
sentences.text:
That’s as we list to grace him.
Methinks our pleasure might have been demanded
Ere you had spoke so far. He led our powers,
Bore the commission of my place and person—
The which immediacy may well stand up
And call itself your brother.

sentences.text:
Not so hot.
In his own grace he doth exalt himself
More than in your addition.

sentences.speaker: GONERIL
sentences.text:
Not so hot.
In his own grace he doth exalt himself
More than in your addition.

sentences.speaker: REGAN
sentences.text:
In my rights,
By me invested, he compeers the best.

sentences.speaker: ALBANY
sentences.text:
That were the most if he should
husband you.

sentences.speaker: REGAN
sentences.text: Jesters do oft prove prophets.

sentences.speaker: GONERIL
sentences.text:
Holla, holla!
That eye that told you so looked but asquint.

sentences.speaker: GONERIL
sentences.text:
Holla, holla!
That eye that told you so looked but asquint.

sentences.speaker: REGAN
sentences.text:
Lady, I am not well, else I should answer
From a full-flowing stomach.
[to EDMUND ] General,
Take thou my soldiers, prisoners, patrimony.
Dispose of them, of me. The walls is thine.
Witness the world that I create thee here
My lord and master.

sentences.speaker: GONERIL
sentences.text: Mean you to enjoy him then?

sentences.speaker: ALBANY
sentences.text: The let-alone lies not in your good will.

sentences.speaker: EDMUND
sentences.text: Nor in thine, lord.

sentences.speaker: ALBANY
sentences.text: Half-blooded fellow, yes.

sentences.speaker: REGAN
sentences.text:
[to EDMUND] Let the drum strike and prove my title
thine.

sentences.speaker: ALBANY
sentences.text:
Stay yet. Hear reason.—Edmund, I arrest thee
On capital treason, and in thine attaint
This gilded serpent. [indicates GONERIL ]
[to REGAN ] For your claim, fair sister,
I bar it in the interest of my wife.
'Tis she is subcontracted to this lord.
And I, her husband, contradict your banns.
If you will marry, make your loves to me,
My lady is bespoke.

sentences.speaker: GONERIL
sentences.text: An interlude!

sentences.speaker: ALBANY
sentences.text:
Thou art armed, Gloucester. Let the trumpet sound.
If none appear to prove upon thy person
Thy heinous, manifest, and many treasons,
There is my pledge. [throws down his glove]
I’ll make it on thy heart,
Ere I taste bread, thou art in nothing less
Than I have here proclaimed thee.

sentences.speaker: REGAN
sentences.text: Sick, oh, sick!

sentences.speaker: GONERIL
sentences.text: [aside] If not, I’ll ne'er trust medicine.

sentences.speaker: EDMUND
sentences.text:
[throwing down his glove]
There’s my exchange. What in the world he is
That names me traitor, villainlike he lies.
Call by thy trumpet. He that dares approach,
On him—on you, who not?—I will maintain
My truth and honor firmly.

sentences.speaker: EDMUND
sentences.text: A herald, ho, a herald!
Enter a HERALD

sentences.speaker: ALBANY
sentences.text:
[to EDMUND] Trust to thy single virtue, for thy
soldiers,
All levied in my name, have in my name
Took their discharge.

sentences.speaker: ALBANY
sentences.text:
[to EDMUND] Trust to thy single virtue, for thy
soldiers,

sentences.speaker: REGAN
sentences.text: My sickness grows upon me.

sentences.speaker: ALBANY
sentences.text: She is not well. Convey her to my tent.

sentences.speaker: ALBANY
sentences.text: She is not well. Convey her to my tent.
Exit REGAN, led

sentences.speaker: ALBANY
sentences.text:
Come hither, herald.—Let the trumpet sound,—
And read out this. [gives the HERALD a document]

sentences.speaker: SECOND CAPTAIN
sentences.text: Sound, trumpet!
A trumpet sounds

sentences.speaker: HERALD
sentences.text:
[reads]
“If any man of quality or degree within the lists of
the army will maintain upon Edmund, supposed Earl of
Gloucester, that he is a manifold traitor, let him
appear by the third sound of the trumpet. He is bold in
his defense.”

Third trumpet Trumpet answers within Enter EDGAR, at the third sound, armed, a trumpet before him

sentences.speaker: ALBANY
sentences.text:
[to HERALD] Ask him his purposes, why he appears
Upon this call o' th' trumpet.

sentences.speaker: HERALD
sentences.text:
What are you?
Your name, your quality, and why you answer
This present summons?

sentences.speaker: HERALD
sentences.text:
What are you?
Your name, your quality, and why you answer
This present summons?

sentences.speaker: HERALD
sentences.text:
What are you?
Your name, your quality, and why you answer
This present summons?

sentences.speaker: EDGAR
sentences.text:
O, know, my name is lost.
By treason’s tooth bare-gnawn and canker-bit.
Yet am I noble as the adversary
I come to cope withal.

sentences.speaker: EDGAR
sentences.text:
O, know, my name is lost.
By treason’s tooth bare-gnawn and canker-bit.
Yet am I noble as the adversary
I come to cope withal.

sentences.speaker: ALBANY
sentences.text: Which is that adversary?

sentences.speaker: EDGAR
sentences.text: What’s he that speaks for Edmund, Earl of Gloucester?

sentences.speaker: EDMUND
sentences.text: Himself. What sayst thou to him?

sentences.speaker: EDMUND
sentences.text: Himself. What sayst thou to him?

sentences.speaker: EDGAR
sentences.text:
Draw thy sword,
That if my speech offend a noble heart
Thy arm may do thee justice. [draws his sword] Here is
mine.
Behold: it is the privilege of mine honors,
My oath, and my profession. I protest—
Maugre thy strength, youth, place, and eminence,
Despite thy victor sword and fire-new fortune,
Thy valor and thy heart—thou art a traitor,
False to thy gods, thy brother, and thy father,
Conspirant 'gainst this high illustrious prince,
And from th' extremest upward of thy head
To the descent and dust below thy foot
A most toad-spotted traitor. Say thou “No,”
This sword, this arm, and my best spirits are bent
To prove upon thy heart, whereto I speak,
Thou liest.

sentences.speaker: EDMUND
sentences.text:
In wisdom I should ask thy name.
But since thy outside looks so fair and warlike,
And that thy tongue some say of breeding breathes,
What safe and nicely I might well delay
By rule of knighthood, I disdain and spurn.
Back do I toss these treasons to thy head,
With the hell-hated lie o'erwhelm thy heart—
Which, for they yet glance by and scarcely bruise,
This sword of mine shall give them instant way,
Where they shall rest for ever.—Trumpets, speak!

With the hell-hated lie o'erwhelm thy heart—
Which, for they yet glance by and scarcely bruise,
This sword of mine shall give them instant way,
Where they shall rest for ever.—Trumpets, speak!

sentences.speaker: EDMUND
sentences.text:
In wisdom I should ask thy name.
But since thy outside looks so fair and warlike,
And that thy tongue some say of breeding breathes,
What safe and nicely I might well delay
By rule of knighthood, I disdain and spurn.
Back do I toss these treasons to thy head,
With the hell-hated lie o'erwhelm thy heart—
Which, for they yet glance by and scarcely bruise,
This sword of mine shall give them instant way,
Where they shall rest for ever.—Trumpets, speak!

sentences.speaker: GONERIL

By th' law of arms thou wast not bound to answer
An unknown opposite. Thou art not vanquished,
But cozened and beguiled.

sentences.speaker: EDMUND

What you have charged me with, that have I done—
And more, much more. The time will bring it out.
'Tis past, and so am I.
[to EDGAR ]
But what art thou
That hast this fortune on me? If thou'rt noble,
I do forgive thee.

sentences.speaker: EDGAR
sentences.text:
Let’s exchange charity.
I am no less in blood than thou art, Edmund.
If more, the more thou’st wronged me.
My name is Edgar, and thy father’s son.
The gods are just, and of our pleasant vices
Make instruments to plague us.
The dark and vicious place where thee he got
Cost him his eyes.

sentences.speaker: EDGAR
sentences.text:
By nursing them, my lord. List a brief tale,
And when ’tis told, oh, that my heart would burst!
The bloody proclamation to escape,
That followed me so near— O our lives' sweetness,
That we the pain of death would hourly die
Rather than die at once!— taught me to shift
Into a madman’s rags, t' assume a semblance
That very dogs disdained. And in this habit
Met I my father with his bleeding rings,
Their precious stones new lost, became his guide,
Led him, begged for him, saved him from despair.
Never—O fault!—revealed myself unto him
Until some half-hour past, when I was armed.
Not sure, though hoping of this good success,
I asked his blessing, and from first to last
Told him my pilgrimage. But his flawed heart—
Alack, too weak the conflict to support—
'Twixt two extremes of passion, joy and grief,
Burst smilingly.

This speech of yours hath moved me,
And shall perchance do good. But speak you on.
You look as you had something more to say.

sentences.speaker: ALBANY

If there be more, more woeful, hold it in.
For I am almost ready to dissolve,
Hearing of this.

sentences.speaker: ALBANY

sentences.speaker: EDGAR
sentences.text:
This would have seemed a period
To such as love not sorrow, but another
To amplify too much would make much more
And top extremity.
Whilst I was big in clamor came there in a man
Who, having seen me in my worst estate,
Shunned my abhorred society, but then, finding
Who ’twas that so endured, with his strong arms
He fastened on my neck, and bellowed out
As he’d burst heaven, threw him on my father,
Told the most piteous tale of Lear and him
That ever ear received— which in recounting
His grief grew puissant and the strings of life
Began to crack. Twice then the trumpets sounded,
And there I left him tranced.

The one the other poisoned for my sake,
And after slew herself.

sentences.speaker: EDMUND
sentences.text:
Yet Edmund was beloved.
The one the other poisoned for my sake,
And after slew herself.

sentences.speaker: ALBANY
sentences.text: Even so.—Cover their faces.

sentences.speaker: ALBANY
sentences.text: Even so.—Cover their faces.

sentences.speaker: EDMUND
sentences.text:
I pant for life. Some good I mean to do
Despite of mine own nature. Quickly send—
Be brief in it—to th' castle, for my writ
Is on the life of Lear and on Cordelia.
Nay, send in time!

sentences.speaker: ALBANY
sentences.text: Run, run, O, run!

sentences.speaker: EDGAR
sentences.text:
To who, my lord?—Who hath the office? Send
Thy token of reprieve.

sentences.speaker: EDGAR
sentences.text:
To who, my lord?—Who hath the office? Send
Thy token of reprieve.

sentences.speaker: EDGAR
sentences.text:
To who, my lord?—Who hath the office? Send
Thy token of reprieve.

sentences.speaker: EDMUND
sentences.text:
Well thought on. Take my sword. The captain—
Give it the captain.

sentences.speaker: EDMUND
sentences.text:
Well thought on. Take my sword. The captain—
Give it the captain.

sentences.speaker: EDMUND
sentences.text:
Well thought on. Take my sword. The captain—
Give it the captain.

sentences.speaker: ALBANY
sentences.text: Haste thee for thy life.
Exit a soldier

sentences.speaker: EDMUND
sentences.text:
He hath commission from thy wife and me
To hang Cordelia in the prison and
To lay the blame upon her own despair,
That she fordid herself.

sentences.speaker: ALBANY
sentences.text: The gods defend her!—bear him hence awhile.
Exit soldiers with EDMUND
Enter LEAR with CORDELIA in his arms, a THIRD KNIGHT following

sentences.speaker: LEAR
sentences.text:
Howl, howl, howl, howl! Oh, you are men of stones.
Had I your tongues and eyes, I’d use them so
That heaven’s vault should crack. She’s gone forever.
I know when one is dead and when one lives.
She’s dead as earth. Lend me a looking-glass.
If that her breath will mist or stain the stone,
Why then, she lives.

sentences.speaker: KENT
sentences.text: Is this the promised end?

sentences.speaker: EDGAR
sentences.text: Or image of that horror?

sentences.speaker: ALBANY
sentences.text: Fall and cease.

sentences.speaker: LEAR
sentences.text:
This feather stirs. She lives. If it be so,
It is a chance which does redeem all sorrows
That ever I have felt.

sentences.speaker: LEAR
sentences.text:

It is a chance which does redeem all sorrows

sentences.speaker: KENT
sentences.text: O my good master!

sentences.speaker: LEAR
sentences.text: Prithee, away.

sentences.speaker: EDGAR
sentences.text: 'Tis noble Kent, your friend.

sentences.speaker: LEAR
sentences.text:
A plague upon you, murderers, traitors all!
I might have saved her. Now she’s gone for ever.—
Cordelia, Cordelia, stay a little. Ha?
What is ’t thou say’st?— Her voice was ever soft,
Gentle and low, an excellent thing in woman.—
I killed the slave that was a-hanging thee.

sentences.speaker: THIRD KNIGHT
sentences.text: 'Tis true, my lords, he did.

sentences.speaker: LEAR
sentences.text:
Did I not, fellow?
I have seen the day with my good biting falchion
I would have made them skip. I am old now,
And these same crosses spoil me. [to KENT ] Who are you?
Mine eyes are not o' th' best, I’ll tell you straight.

sentences.speaker: KENT
sentences.text:
If Fortune brag of two she loved and hated,
One of them we behold.

sentences.speaker: LEAR
sentences.text:
This a dull sight.
Are you not Kent?

sentences.speaker: LEAR
sentences.text:
This a dull sight.
Are you not Kent?

sentences.speaker: KENT
sentences.text:
The same. Your servant Kent.
Where is your servant Caius?

sentences.speaker: KENT
sentences.text:
The same. Your servant Kent.
Where is your servant Caius?

sentences.speaker: KENT
sentences.text:
The same. Your servant Kent.
Where is your servant Caius?

sentences.speaker: LEAR
sentences.text:
He’s a good fellow, I can tell you that.
He’ll strike, and quickly too. He’s dead and rotten.

sentences.speaker: LEAR
sentences.text:

He’ll strike, and quickly too. He’s dead and rotten.

sentences.speaker: KENT
sentences.text: No, my good lord. I am the very man—

sentences.speaker: KENT
sentences.text: No, my good lord. I am the very man—

sentences.speaker: LEAR
sentences.text: I’ll see that straight.

sentences.speaker: KENT
sentences.text:
That from your first of difference and decay
Have followed your sad steps.

sentences.speaker: LEAR
sentences.text: You’re welcome hither.

sentences.speaker: KENT
sentences.text:
Nor no man else. All’s cheerless, dark, and deadly.
Your eldest daughters have fordone themselves,
And desperately are dead.

sentences.speaker: KENT
sentences.text:

sentences.speaker: LEAR
sentences.text: Ay, so I think.

sentences.speaker: ALBANY
sentences.text:
He knows not what he says, and vain it is
That we present us to him.

sentences.speaker: ALBANY
sentences.text:
He knows not what he says, and vain it is
That we present us to him.
Enter THIRD MESSENGER

sentences.speaker: EDGAR
sentences.text: Very bootless.

sentences.speaker: THIRD MESSENGER
sentences.text: Edmund is dead, my lord.

sentences.speaker: ALBANY
sentences.text:
That’s but a trifle here.—
You lords and noble friends, know our intent.
What comfort to this great decay may come
Shall be applied. For us, we will resign
During the life of this old majesty
To him our absolute power.
[to EDGAR and KENT ] You, to your rights
With boot, and such addition as your honors
Have more than merited.— All friends shall taste
The wages of their virtue, and all foes
The cup of their deservings. O, see, see!

sentences.speaker: LEAR
sentences.text:
And my poor fool is hanged.—No, no, no life?
Why should a dog, a horse, a rat have life,
And thou no breath at all? Oh, thou'lt come no more,
Never, never, never, never, never.—
Pray you, undo this button. Thank you, sir.
Do you see this? Look on her. Look, her lips.
Look there, look there. O, O, O, O.
[dies]

sentences.speaker: EDGAR
sentences.text: He faints!—My lord, my lord!

sentences.speaker: KENT
sentences.text: Break, heart. I prithee, break!

sentences.speaker: KENT
sentences.text: Break, heart. I prithee, break!

sentences.speaker: EDGAR
sentences.text: [to LEAR] Look up, my lord.

sentences.speaker: KENT
sentences.text:
Vex not his ghost. O, let him pass. He hates him
That would upon the rack of this tough world
Stretch him out longer.

sentences.speaker: KENT
sentences.text:
Vex not his ghost. O, let him pass. He hates him
That would upon the rack of this tough world
Stretch him out longer.

sentences.speaker: KENT
sentences.text:
Vex not his ghost. O, let him pass. He hates him
That would upon the rack of this tough world
Stretch him out longer.

sentences.speaker: EDGAR
sentences.text: Oh, he is gone indeed.

sentences.speaker: KENT
sentences.text:
The wonder is he hath endured so long.
He but usurped his life.

sentences.speaker: KENT
sentences.text:
The wonder is he hath endured so long.
He but usurped his life.

sentences.speaker: ALBANY
sentences.text:
Bear them from hence. Our present business
Is to general woe.
[to KENT and EDGAR] Friends of my soul, you twain
Rule in this realm, and the gored state sustain.

sentences.speaker: ALBANY
sentences.text:

Is to general woe.
[to KENT and EDGAR] Friends of my soul, you twain
Rule in this realm, and the gored state sustain.

sentences.speaker: KENT
sentences.text:
I have a journey, sir, shortly to go.
My master calls me. I must not say no.

sentences.speaker: KENT
sentences.text:
I have a journey, sir, shortly to go.
My master calls me. I must not say no.

sentences.speaker: EDGAR
sentences.text:
The weight of this sad time we must obey.
Speak what we feel, not what we ought to say.
The oldest hath borne most. We that are young
Shall never see so much, nor live so long.
